---
title: "KPop_analysis"
author: "Aleix Cebrián Valero"
date: "2026-03-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
df <- read_excel("data/KPopDataset.xlsx", 
     col_types = c("skip", "date", "text", 
         "text", "text", "text", "text", "text"),
     n_max = 5638)
summary(df)
head(df)
tail(df)

colnames(df) <- c("Date", "Artist", "Song_name", "Korean_name", "Video", "Type", "Release")
colnames(df)
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
df$Video <- str_sub(df$Video,30,40)
df$Video
```
